allow: Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(en.settings\); console.log\(keys.join\(''\\n''\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); console.log\(''general tab:'', en.settings?.tab_general\); console.log\(''plugin tab:'', en.settings?.tab_plugin\)")
Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); console.log\(''consumer_key:'', en.settings.consumer_key\); console.log\(''consumer_secret:'', en.settings.consumer_secret\)")
Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(en.settings\); console.log\(''Total settings keys:'', keys.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); const ro = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/ro.json''\); const enKeys = Object.keys\(en.settings\); const roKeys = Object.keys\(ro.settings\); const missing = enKeys.filter\(k => !roKeys.includes\(k\)\); console.log\(''Missing in ro.json:'', missing.length, missing\)")

Bash(node -e "var en = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/en.json''\); var ro = require\(''./lib/i18n/messages/ro.json''\); var enKeys = Object.keys\(en.settings\); var roKeys = Object.keys\(ro.settings\); var missing = enKeys.filter\(function\(k\) { return roKeys.indexOf\(k\) === -1; }\); console.log\(''en settings keys:'', enKeys.length\); console.log\(''ro settings keys:'', roKeys.length\); console.log\(''Missing in ro.json:'', JSON.stringify\(missing\)\);")
